question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asks no didactic questions of the user. It writes the solution directly, and only answers questions posed by the student. There are zero teachable-moment prompts initiated by the tutor.

question_quality.rationale: No choices or forks are surfaced to the student. The Pair makes all design decisions unilaterally (translate vs loop, frozenset vs set, validate-first ordering) without inviting student input.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no scaffolding because there are no questions. The Pair delivers a complete solution, then explains in depth — closer to a lecture than guided discovery.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is clear and the explanations in Turn 2 are technically excellent and directly responsive to the student's follow-ups. However, the interaction is one-directional: tutor solves, student asks, tutor explains, student concludes.

effectiveness.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)

friction.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)
